reasoning: The control CM-8(6) focuses on maintaining an inventory of system components with assessed configurations and approved deviations. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that components (e.g., nodes, pods, services) are tracked, their configurations are assessed for compliance, and any deviations are documented. This involves integrating configuration management tools and processes to ensure compliance and manage deviations effectively.
title: System Component Inventory - System component inventory | assessed configurations and approved deviations inc
